text: Managing a team requires a balance of several important skills. First, clear communication is essential. You need to explain tasks and goals so everyone understands them. Delegation is also key; trust your team members with responsibilities rather than doing everything yourself. Regular feedback helps people improve and feel valued. For motivation, recognize achievements and encourage growth. When conflicts arise, address them quickly by listening to all sides and finding a fair solution. A good manager creates a supportive environment where the team can work effectively together.
